requirement_topic.en: Angola IANORQ Conformity and Import Readiness for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 安哥拉IANORQ合格评定及电动汽车充电桩进口准备
requirement_topic.zht: 安哥拉IANORQ合格評定及電動汽車充電樁進口準備

summary.en: IANORQ is Angola's standards and quality body. For EV chargers, exporters should treat IANORQ conformity, customs documentation, Portuguese labeling, IEC safety and EMC evidence, importer responsibility, and project-specific ENDE / IRSEA coordination as separate gates. A single official Angola EVSE whole-unit mandatory certification rule could not be confirmed from public official sources as of 2026-06-14, so the conservative approach is to verify the route for the specific HS code, charger type, voltage rating, radio functions, cable set, and installation project before shipment.
summary.zh: IANORQ是安哥拉标准和质量机构。对于电动汽车充电桩，出口商应将IANORQ合格评定、海关文件、葡萄牙语标签、IEC安全和EMC证据、进口商责任，以及项目特定的ENDE / IRSEA协调作为独立门槛处理。截至2026年6月14日，未能从公开官方来源确认适用于安哥拉EVSE整机的单一强制认证规则，因此保守做法是在出货前按具体HS编码、充电桩类型、电压额定值、无线功能、电缆组件和安装项目核实路径。
summary.zht: IANORQ是安哥拉標準和質量機構。對於電動汽車充電樁，出口商應將IANORQ合格評定、海關文件、葡萄牙語標籤、IEC安全和EMC證據、進口商責任，以及項目特定的ENDE / IRSEA協調作為獨立門檻處理。截至2026年6月14日，未能從公開官方來源確認適用於安哥拉EVSE整機的單一強制認證規則，因此保守做法是在出貨前按具體HS編碼、充電樁類型、電壓額定值、無線功能、電纜組件和安裝項目核實路徑。

standards_or_laws: IANORQ standards and quality / conformity assessment role
Angola customs and importer documentation for electrical equipment
IEC 61851, IEC 62196, and IEC 61000 evidence where adopted or specified

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930 communication for DC charging, and China domestic certification or acceptance routes where in scope. China CCC, GB/T reports, or domestic grid acceptance may support technical review, but they do not establish Angola market access, IANORQ conformity, IEC connector compatibility, or ENDE project acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流充电GB/T 27930通信，以及适用时的中国国内认证或验收路径准备文件。中国CCC、GB/T报告或国内电网验收可支持技术审查，但不能证明安哥拉市场准入、IANORQ符合性、IEC接口兼容性或ENDE项目验收。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流充電GB/T 27930通訊，以及適用時的中國國內認證或驗收路徑準備文件。中國CCC、GB/T報告或國內電網驗收可支持技術審查，但不能證明安哥拉市場准入、IANORQ符合性、IEC接口兼容性或ENDE項目驗收。

gap.en: Exporters should map the Angola importer, HS code, charger type, rated voltage, radio or SIM functions, cable and coupler accessories, IEC safety and EMC reports, Portuguese manuals and labels, spare-parts plan, warranty service, and ENDE / IRSEA project requirements before claiming Angola readiness. The route should be confirmed with IANORQ, the importer, customs broker, local electrical engineer, and utility/project owner for the specific shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商在宣称充电桩可进入安哥拉前，应明确安哥拉进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、额定电压、无线或SIM功能、电缆及耦合器附件、IEC安全和EMC报告、葡萄牙语说明书及标签、备件计划、保修服务，以及ENDE / IRSEA项目要求。具体出货路径应由IANORQ、进口商、报关代理、本地电气工程师和公用事业/项目业主确认。
gap.zht: 出口商在宣稱充電樁可進入安哥拉前，應明確安哥拉進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、額定電壓、無線或SIM功能、電纜及耦合器附件、IEC安全和EMC報告、葡萄牙語說明書及標籤、備件計劃、保修服務，以及ENDE / IRSEA項目要求。具體出貨路徑應由IANORQ、進口商、報關代理、本地電氣工程師和公用事業/項目業主確認。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — exact IANORQ conformity and import route should be verified for the specific HS code and product configuration; ENDE / IRSEA coordination is mandatory where the charger is connected to the electricity system or required by the project
mandatory_status.cn: China CCC or GB/T evidence is not an Angola conformity, customs, or grid-connection substitute

source.publisher: IANORQ — Instituto Angolano de Normalização e Qualidade

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Angola market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Verify the IANORQ/import route for the exact charger and HS code, then handle IEC evidence, Portuguese labeling, ENDE grid coordination, and IRSEA or project approvals separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足安哥拉市场准入。应针对确切充电桩和HS编码核实IANORQ/进口路径，并分别处理IEC证据、葡萄牙语标签、ENDE电网协调，以及IRSEA或项目批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足安哥拉市場准入。應針對確切充電樁和HS編碼核實IANORQ/進口路徑，並分別處理IEC證據、葡萄牙語標籤、ENDE電網協調，以及IRSEA或項目批准。

requirement_topic.en: Angola EV Market Context — Nascent Demand and Infrastructure
requirement_topic.zh: 安哥拉电动汽车市场背景——需求和基础设施处于起步阶段
requirement_topic.zht: 安哥拉電動汽車市場背景——需求和基礎設施處於起步階段

summary.en: Angola is an oil-producing economy with low EV penetration and early-stage charging infrastructure. Public procurement, corporate fleets, hotels, commercial sites, mining, logistics, and diplomatic or development projects may create charger demand before a broad consumer charging network exists. This market context creates opportunity but also higher project-specific uncertainty: standards, connector choices, utility capacity, payment systems, maintenance, spare parts, and importer responsibilities may be defined case by case.
summary.zh: 安哥拉是石油经济体，电动汽车渗透率较低，充电基础设施仍处于早期阶段。在广泛消费者充电网络形成前，公共采购、企业车队、酒店、商业场址、矿业、物流、外交或发展项目可能先创造充电桩需求。该市场背景带来机会，也带来更高的项目不确定性：标准、接口选择、公用事业容量、支付系统、维护、备件和进口商责任可能逐案确定。
summary.zht: 安哥拉是石油經濟體，電動汽車滲透率較低，充電基礎設施仍處於早期階段。在廣泛消費者充電網絡形成前，公共採購、企業車隊、酒店、商業場址、礦業、物流、外交或發展項目可能先創造充電樁需求。該市場背景帶來機會，也帶來更高的項目不確定性：標準、接口選擇、公用事業容量、支付系統、維護、備件和進口商責任可能逐案確定。

standards_or_laws: Angola oil-economy and early EV-market context
IANORQ / IEC standards route where specified

summary.en: China has a mature, high-volume EV charger market with established GB/T standards, domestic supply chains, network platforms, and service practices. That scale does not translate automatically to Angola because Angola projects may be small, IEC-oriented, utility-constrained, import-dependent, and heavily shaped by individual tenders or site owners.
summary.zh: 中国拥有成熟且大规模的电动汽车充电桩市场，具备完善的GB/T标准、国内供应链、网络平台和服务实践。但这种规模不能自动转换到安哥拉，因为安哥拉项目可能规模较小、倾向IEC体系、受公用事业容量限制、依赖进口，并且高度受单个招标或场地方影响。
summary.zht: 中國擁有成熟且大規模的電動汽車充電樁市場，具備完善的GB/T標準、國內供應鏈、網絡平台和服務實踐。但這種規模不能自動轉換到安哥拉，因為安哥拉項目可能規模較小、傾向IEC體系、受公用事業容量限制、依賴進口，並且高度受單個招標或場地方影響。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021-2035 (China)

gap.en: Treat Angola as an early-stage, project-led charger market. Exporters should avoid broad claims such as 'Angola certified' unless a specific conformity, importer, and project-acceptance route has been completed. Lead time should include IEC retesting, connector redesign, Portuguese documentation, spares and service planning, importer registration, grid studies, and site commissioning.
gap.zh: 应将安哥拉视为早期、项目驱动型充电桩市场。除非已完成具体合格评定、进口商和项目验收路径，出口商应避免使用“安哥拉认证”等宽泛表述。交付周期应包含IEC复测、接口重新设计、葡萄牙语文件、备件和服务规划、进口商登记、电网研究和现场调试。
gap.zht: 應將安哥拉視為早期、項目驅動型充電樁市場。除非已完成具體合格評定、進口商和項目驗收路徑，出口商應避免使用「安哥拉認證」等寬泛表述。交付週期應包含IEC複測、接口重新設計、葡萄牙語文件、備件和服務規劃、進口商登記、電網研究和現場調試。

mandatory_status.target: Market context — not itself a mandatory product standard; technical, import, utility, and project requirements remain independent gates
mandatory_status.cn: Policy and market context only — China EV scale does not reduce Angola conformity or project obligations

source.publisher: International Energy Agency — Angola country profile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Angola should be treated as a nascent EV charging market with project-specific requirements. The opportunity is real, but exporters need conservative claims, IEC-oriented documentation, local importer support, and ENDE / IRSEA project coordination before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将安哥拉视为项目要求差异较大的早期电动汽车充电市场。机会是真实存在的，但出口商在出货前需要谨慎表述、IEC体系文件、本地进口商支持，以及ENDE / IRSEA项目协调。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將安哥拉視為項目要求差異較大的早期電動汽車充電市場。機會是真實存在的，但出口商在出貨前需要謹慎表述、IEC體系文件、本地進口商支持，以及ENDE / IRSEA項目協調。
